---
name: UI/UX improvement
about: Suggest a usability, layout, or interaction improvement
title: "[UX] "
labels: ux
assignees: ''
---

## Area of the UI

[Toolbar | Object tree | Viewport | Inspector | AI panel | Status console | Pencil mode]

## What's awkward today

Describe the friction. What did you expect to be able to do?

## Suggested improvement

How should it behave instead? Mockups/sketches welcome.

## Impact

- [ ] Blocks a core workflow
- [ ] Slows me down
- [ ] Minor polish

## Additional context

Screenshots, related issues, or references from other tools.
